index.title: St. Expedite Press
index.description: St. Expedite Press publishes original Southern fiction, archival reprints, & translation from New Orleans. A non-institutional press for Southern writing at its formal & spiritual extremity.

books.title: Books
books.description: Books, current publications, and three publishing programs from St. Expedite Press.
books.subtitle: The press catalog
books.introText: Three arms, each making a different argument about what Southern writing is owed.

about.title: About
about.description: The mission of St. Expedite Press: a non-institutional, post-corporate project to bootstrap Southern writing outside the approval systems that would contain it.
about.subtitle: New Orleans, LA
about.introText: Osiris was killed by Set and scattered. Isis gathered his limbs and reconstituted him. We take the same disposition toward Southern writing.

donate.title: Donate
donate.description: One-time donations to support St. Expedite Press through Stripe-hosted checkout.
donate.subtitle: Support the press
donate.introTitle: This work continues because of this.
donate.introText: A one-time contribution enters the ongoing work of publication, archive, and continuity.

donateThanks.title: Donation Complete
donateThanks.description: Donation confirmation for St. Expedite Press.
donateThanks.subtitle: Support received

submit.title: Submit
submit.description: Submission guidelines for St. Expedite Press: original Southern fiction, archival reprint proposals, and literary translation across Spanish, French, and Russian.
submit.subtitle: Manuscript inquiries
submit.introTitle: Three programs, each with distinct criteria.

lab.title: Lab
lab.description: Experimental instruments from St. Expedite Press, including the American Anglossic Compass.
lab.subtitle: Experimental instruments
lab.introTitle: The Lab runs work that has not yet found its form in the catalog.
lab.introText: Instruments that require a different kind of attention than a book.

gallery.title: Store
gallery.description: Books, prints, and objects from St. Expedite Press, loaded live from the shop.
gallery.subtitle: Press objects. Direct.
gallery.introTitle: Books when they exist. Prints when they mean something.
gallery.introText: Objects from the press's working life.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: General correspondence and submission inquiries for St. Expedite Press.
contact.subtitle: General and submission inquiries

services.title: Services
services.description: Advisory, editorial, and decision-intelligence services offered through St. Expedite Press.
services.subtitle: Advisory & editorial work
services.introTitle: Selected engagements for institutions that need careful judgment.
services.introText: A small number of external engagements, taken selectively. The number is small by design.
